member.name: T:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.AS4
member.summary: Task class for AS4 PullRequest operations.

member.name: M:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.AS4.PullRequest(Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Input,Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Options,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles an inbound AS4 eb:PullRequest signal received via a Frends HTTP trigger. Parses the MPC from the PullRequest, then either: (a) builds and returns a signed, encrypted UserMessage containing the provided payload, or (b) returns an EBMS:0006 EmptyMessagePartitionChannel warning signal when no payload is provided. The returned ResponseBody and ResponseContentType are intended to be used directly as the synchronous HTTP response body and Content-Type header of the Frends HTTP trigger, completing the back-channel exchange required by the AS4 Pull pattern. [Documentation](https://tasks.frends.com/tasks/CHANNEL/Frends.AS4.PullRequest)
member.param: The raw HTTP trigger body and Content-Type header containing the eb:PullRequest signal, plus the optional payload file path and routing/certificate parameters for the response.
Behavioural flags: SignResponse, EncryptResponse, and ThrowErrorOnFailure.
A cancellation token provided by the Frends Platform.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Error
member.summary: Error information returned when the AS4 HandlePullRequest task encounters a failure.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Error.Message
member.summary: Human-readable summary of the error.
member.example: Failed to parse PullRequest: no eb:PullRequest element found.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Error.AdditionalInfo
member.summary: The underlying exception providing stack trace and inner exception details.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Input
member.summary: Input parameters for the AS4 HandlePullRequest task.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Input.RequestBody
member.summary: The raw HTTP request body received from the Frends HTTP trigger. Must contain a Multipart/Related SOAP envelope with an eb:PullRequest signal.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Input.ContentTypeHeader
member.summary: The value of the Content-Type HTTP request header from the Frends HTTP trigger, including the multipart boundary parameter.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Input.PayloadFilePath
member.summary: Full path to the file to dequeue and return as the UserMessage payload. When left empty, the task returns an EBMS:0006 EmptyMessagePartitionChannel error signal indicating no message is available on the requested MPC.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Input.SenderPartyId
member.summary: AS4 party identifier for this system (the party serving the MPC queue). Included in the eb:From element of the response UserMessage.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Input.RecipientPartyId
member.summary: AS4 party identifier for the pulling partner. Included in the eb:To element of the response UserMessage.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Input.Service
member.summary: AS4 Service value included in the eb:CollaborationInfo of the response UserMessage.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Input.Action
member.summary: AS4 Action value included in the eb:CollaborationInfo of the response UserMessage.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Input.ConversationId
member.summary: Conversation identifier included in the eb:CollaborationInfo of the response UserMessage.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Input.AgreementRef
member.summary: Optional P-Mode agreement reference included in the eb:CollaborationInfo of the response. Leave empty if not required by the pulling partner.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Input.SenderCertificatePath
member.summary: File system path to the PFX (PKCS#12) certificate used to sign the response UserMessage. Must contain the private key.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Input.SenderCertificatePassword
member.summary: Password protecting the sender PFX certificate file.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Input.RecipientCertificatePath
member.summary: File system path to the pulling partner's public X.509 certificate (.cer/.crt) used to encrypt the response payload. The partner uses their private key to decrypt it.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Options
member.summary: Additional options controlling the AS4 HandlePullRequest task behaviour.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Options.SignResponse
member.summary: When true, the response UserMessage will be signed using the sender certificate with RSA-SHA256. Signing covers the eb:Messaging header and the payload attachment. Per the AS4 profile, response messages MUST be signed when a payload is present.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Options.EncryptResponse
member.summary: When true, the payload attachment will be encrypted using AES-256-CBC with the session key wrapped using the recipient's public certificate (RSA-OAEP).

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Options.ThrowErrorOnFailure
member.summary: When true, any exception during task execution is re-thrown and propagates to the Frends process. When false, the exception is captured in Result.Error and Result.Success is set to false.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Options.ErrorMessageOnFailure
member.summary: Overrides the error message returned or thrown on failure. When empty, the original exception message is used.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Result
member.summary: Result returned by the AS4 HandlePullRequest task. The ResponseBody and ResponseContentType should be used to populate the Frends HTTP trigger's synchronous response back to the pulling partner.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Result.Success
member.summary: Indicates whether the task completed successfully.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Result.ResponseBody
member.summary: The complete MIME multipart body to return as the HTTP response body. Contains either a signed/encrypted UserMessage, or an EBMS:0006 error signal. Set this as the body of the Frends HTTP trigger response.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Result.ResponseContentType
member.summary: The Content-Type header value to set on the HTTP response. Includes the multipart boundary required to parse the MIME body.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Result.IsEmptyQueue
member.summary: True when no payload was available and an EBMS:0006 EmptyMessagePartitionChannel error signal was returned instead of a UserMessage. The calling Frends process can use this to decide whether to mark the queued item as delivered or to retry later.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Result.RequestedMpc
member.summary: The Message Partition Channel (MPC) URI extracted from the inbound PullRequest. Use this to determine which business queue to dequeue from before calling this task.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Result.PullRequestMessageId
member.summary: The MessageId extracted from the inbound eb:PullRequest signal.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Definitions.Result.Error
member.summary: Error information populated when Success is false. Null on successful completion.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Helpers.EmptyQueueSignalBuilder
member.summary: Builds an EBMS:0006 EmptyMessagePartitionChannel error signal response. Returned when no message is available on the requested MPC. Per the AS4 / ebMS 3.0 spec this is a Warning-severity signal, NOT an HTTP error. The HTTP status code remains 200 OK.

member.name: M:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Helpers.EmptyQueueSignalBuilder.Build(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds the SOAP error signal and wraps it in a single-part MIME body. Returns the MIME body string and Content-Type header value.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Helpers.PullRequestParser
member.summary: Parses an inbound AS4 Multipart/Related request body to extract the eb:PullRequest signal.

member.name: M:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Helpers.PullRequestParser.Parse(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Parses the raw MIME request body and returns the MPC and PullRequest MessageId.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.PullRequest.Helpers.UserMessageBuilder
member.summary: Builds the synchronous AS4 UserMessage response to a PullRequest. The response is a Multipart/Related MIME message containing a signed and optionally encrypted SOAP envelope plus the payload attachment.
Builds a complete MIME UserMessage response from a queued payload. Returns the serialised MIME body string and the Content-Type header value.
